case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MARIA MAGDALENA ESPINOZA RAMIREZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-30-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-20-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY PRICILLA TOVAR, COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT MARIA MAGDALENA ESPINOZA RAMIREZ DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-20-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-22-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO LEGAL COLLECTION'S OFFICER. DEFENDANT MARIA MAGDALENA ESPINOZA RAMIREZ DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-22-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC., REPRESENTED BY NARALLANI SANCHEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARIA MAGDALENA ESPINOZA RAMIREZ IS NOT PRESENT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, MARIA MAGDALENA ESPINOZA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) NARALLANI SANCHEZ, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, MARIA MAGDALENA ESPINOZA $373.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $458.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 - SERVED SEP-05-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, MARIA MAGDALENA ESPINOZA
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
